auditor: Chartered Professional Accountants (Aaron Keetley, CPA, CA, CMA - Port Coquitlam)
one_time_description: Hatch Point Settlement - specific land claim settlement received in fiscal 2022
economic_notes: First Nation has two wholly-owned GBEs: 1239774 B.C. Ltd. (revenue $1,264,911, net income $123,913) and 1228435 B.C. Ltd. (revenue $0, net loss $37,069). Bokecen Xaxe (Sacred) Society is a consolidated subsidiary. First Nation received a large Hatch Point IR 12 specific land claim settlement in 2022. Pauquachin Legacy Trust is an independently administered trust of which the First Nation is sole beneficiary.
notes: Large one-time Hatch Point Settlement of $41,760,879 dominates 2022 revenue and surplus. Financial statements were restated for prior period adjustments affecting fiscal 2021 figures (accumulated surplus increased by $146,717). Two GBEs accounted for by modified equity method (unaudited financials). Consolidated subsidiary is Bokecen Xaxe (Sacred) Society. Deferred revenue was $5,164,548 in 2021 but $0 in 2022 due to recognition of previously deferred CMHC and other funds. Auditor firm name not explicitly stated beyond partner names and Port Coquitlam BC address; total government transfers calculated as ISC + CMHC + FNHA + Gaming + CSEST + FNESC + DFO + Province of BC = 2,582,987 + 223,679 + 1,001,941 + 202,182 + 96,603 + 68,000 + 976,902 + 120,689 = 5,272,983; OSR includes Hatch Point Settlement, interest, GBE earnings, other revenue, Ottawa Trust, rental, and Legacy Trust distributions.
